problem: Phase 9 needed one canonical binding for security reporting and compliance export destinations that prevents raw artifact URLs, inline secrets, or unmanaged downloads while preserving artifact presentation settlement.
minimumGuarantees: Tenant, environment, framework, and artifact class are part of the natural scope.
Destination credentials are referenced by vault refs and never stored as inline secret material.
Every transfer is bound to ArtifactPresentationContract and OutboundNavigationGrant.
Fake receivers observe only redacted summaries, manifest metadata, hashes, and settlement refs.
Stale graph, stale redaction, missing secret, denied scope, permission denial, and delivery failure fixtures fail closed.
